summary: Recorded the manual finding that German did not appear in per-app language testing, documented the two failure shapes, and preserved a diagnostic artifact. Verified current source and an unsigned simulator build package de.lproj resources; no local TestFlight IPA or xcarchive was available to inspect.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-manual-language-diagnostic-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
validations_failed: No local .ipa or .xcarchive was available to inspect the installed TestFlight artifact.

contract_status_changes.before: Docs gave the manual Settings path but did not record the observed German-missing failure or the diagnostic fork.
contract_status_changes.after: Docs and proof artifact record the failure shapes, source/build packaging checks, TestFlight archive checks, and CFBundleLocalizations follow-up condition.

residual_risks: The actual TestFlight IPA or xcarchive was not available locally, so TestFlight packaging of de.lproj remains unverified.
Manual German language selection remains unproven.
If the TestFlight artifact packages de.lproj but iOS still omits German after German is added to Language & Region, a narrow CFBundleLocalizations metadata slice may be needed.
next_recommended_reason: Clean stop is valid; if German still does not appear, inspect the actual TestFlight IPA/xcarchive before changing app metadata.

source_references.title: Apple Developer QA1828: How iOS Determines the Language For Your App
Apple Support: Change the language on your iPhone or iPad
